AbiYT-dlp.title: AbiYT-dlp
AbiYT-dlp.desc: AbiYT-dlp is a Python library with full-featured YouTube video downloader. It allows fast downloading of videos, playlists, and channels, supports format conversion, proxy usage, and integrates easily with other tools.
